## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between growthx.ai and Hellobdv to discuss content strategy, website launch, and ongoing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production to increase gradually as quality aligns with expectations (currently \~5 articles/week, aiming for \~10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Website alpha delivery on Aug 19, potential full launch Sept 5-24; CMS access likely available Aug 19](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Artifacts being updated frequently (2-3x/week) based on detailed feedback; will incorporate new PDP copy](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [New fact-checking workflow for ingredient pages expected this week](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Quality

  - [Currently producing \~5 articles/week, will increase to \~10/week as quality improves](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Aiming for \~50 articles at launch, with potential for 40 more in the next two months](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining quality while increasing volume; avoiding premature mass production](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Long-term strategy to include more service-oriented content and "organic link magnets"](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### Website Launch and Structure

  - [Alpha delivery: August 19](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Potential full launch: September 5-24 (company launch on 24th)](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [CMS access likely available from August 19](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Matthew to connect with development team for site structure details](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [growthx.ai to pre-populate internal links once structure is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### Content Workflow and Artifacts

  - [Artifacts being updated 2-3 times per week based on detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Monthly updates as the minimum ongoing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [New PDP copy to be incorporated in the next artifact update](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Notion format preferred for easier integration with Claude AI](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Fact-Checking and Ingredient Pages

  - [New fact-checking workflow expected this week](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Will be applied to ingredient pages and other content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Pending engineering fix for related bug](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Author Personas and Writing Styles

  - [growthx.ai developing capability to create specific author personas](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Can fine-tune writing styles based on existing content or desired characteristics](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Potential future application for Hellobdv's different author types (OB, CEO, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to update artifacts in Notion format](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Brian to connect Matthew with the website development team](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Continue current content production pace for \~2 more weeks, then reassess for potential increase](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Incorporate new PDP copy into next artifact update](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Implement fact-checking workflow for ingredient pages once available](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Monitor website launch progress and prepare for CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/qZDHxKUTVozSRLgSWUy4zYWmX3toS7VA?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
